title: cutandia maritima
intro: Cutandia maritima, also known as sea sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cutandia maritima include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as having potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. Herbal preparations of Cutandia maritima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
